data.body:
=== PROGRESS (loop iteration 2, 2026-06-15) ===
CLOSED this iteration (all committed + PUSHED; origin/main @ bdcbbd26):
- (c) e143-31fd-bf2f-458e Full 3-interface coverage — DONE. Gap analysis -> closed G1 (MCP sign/verify typed output + canonical schemas + TOTAL-partition completeness guard), G2 (MCP transition/claim concurrency-error identity), G3 (7 Jira bidirectional field round-trips: description ADF / blocked+cancelled status-label / label / parent / comment echo, chaining real pure differs; + gated live reconcile dry-run smoke, verified live 38s), G5 (lib+MCP reopen concurrency), G6 (61% coverage baseline + fail_under=50 + behavior x interface matrix in docs/coverage.md). Strengthened tautological deps-parity assertion. Commit bdcbbd26.
- DISCOVERED (G4): story 25ae-92e6-2927-49b6 'Implement Jira reconciler link/relation sync' — link sync is an UNIMPLEMENTED capability (OutboundMutation.links always []); scoped OUT of (c) AC, linked discovered_from e143. Future work, NOT part of this epic's closure.

REMAINING (in order):
- (d) cf14-d845-075a-4f74 Test reorg along seams. HARD CAP 24 files/dir; target 6-12. CURRENT over-cap offender: tests/interfaces has 42 .py files (must split into subdirs along logical seams: schema/contract, parity, mcp, concurrency/exit-codes, etc.). Verify green locally + CI; MAINTAIN test isolation (run with pytest-randomly / -p no:randomly cross-check order-independence). Watch for path-loaded reconciler tests (spec_from_file_location) and conftest scoping when moving files.
- (e) 6623-726e-980e-4ace Opus SDET review loop — prime opus subagent as SDET, review testing, remediate important/critical, REPEAT until none. Then CLOSE THE EPIC (all other children then closed: a,b,c done; d pending).

ENV: dev venv /tmp/rebar-dev; fixed --basetemp (use distinct basetemps for parallel agents). Suite: broad 1759 passed / integration 15 passed / 1 live external (gated). ruff clean. AUTO-PUSH on ticket close is standing policy; each fire FIRST checks main CI (gh run list) + fixes red before feature work. Pattern that works: opus implementer(s) over DISJOINT file sets in parallel + separate opus reviewer per change; independently verify (suite+ruff+live bridge-probe for Jira changes) before commit.
